summary: Comprehensive testing of Dashboard AI Predictive Widgets, Order Status Page, HR Employee Portal, Leave Approvals, and Cashier POS. All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend pages load correctly with AI widgets visible and functional.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/routers/predictions.py - All 4 prediction endpoints working correctly (inventory-demand, customer-clv, peak-hours, profit-decomposition)
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.jsx - 4 AI predictive widgets implemented with proper data-testid attributes (low-stock-widget, peak-hours-widget, customer-clv-widget, profit-trend-widget)
frontend/src/pages/OrderStatusPage.jsx - Customer facing order display working with Preparing/Ready columns and live clock
frontend/src/pages/EmployeePortalPage.jsx - Employee self-service portal loads correctly (shows no profile linked for admin user)
frontend/src/pages/LeaveApprovalsPage.jsx - Leave Management page with filters (Pending/Approved/Rejected/All) and stats summary
frontend/src/pages/CashierPOSPage.jsx - Mobile optimized POS with PIN login, category filters, and mobile cart toggle working
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are fully functional. Dashboard has 4 new AI predictive widgets (Low Stock Alerts, Peak Hours, Customer CLV, Profit Analysis) with data from /api/predictions/* endpoints. Order Status Page at /order-status shows customer-facing order display. Employee Portal at /my-portal shows no profile linked message for admin users. Leave Approvals at /leave-approvals shows leave management with filtering. Cashier POS at /cashier-pos with mobile cart toggle working.

dashboard_ai_widgets.AI: Low Stock Alerts: PASS - Shows 'All stock levels healthy' with Predictive badge
dashboard_ai_widgets.AI: Peak Hours: PASS - Shows '22:00, 09:00, 12:00' as peak hours based on 35 transactions
dashboard_ai_widgets.AI: Profit Analysis: PASS - Shows profit trend with daily analysis
dashboard_ai_widgets.Widget Customization Dialog: PASS - Opens with all widget toggles including new AI widgets

predictive_analytics_api.GET /api/predictions/peak-hours: PASS - Returns peak_hours and transaction count

order_status_page./order-status route: PASS - Page loads with dark theme

hr_employee_portal.Profile section: PASS - Shows 'No employee profile linked' for admin user

leave_approvals./leave-approvals route: PASS - Page loads with Leave Management title
leave_approvals.Stats summary: PASS - Shows 4 Total Requests, 4 Approved, 36 Total Days Used

cashier_pos./cashier route: PASS - PIN login page with numpad
cashier_pos.Menu items: PASS - Shows items with SAR prices and Arabic names

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real implementations with actual database data
